figures.caption: Fig. 3. Severity distributions for the agentic pipeline (dark gray, µ = 2.9) and zero-shot baseline (light gray, µ = 5.4). Samples differ in size and configuration.
Fig. 1. The three-stage agentic evaluation architecture. The flow illustrates the screening agent, heterogeneous jury, and meta-agent for verdict synthesis.
Fig. 4. Evaluator preferences (N = 54 comparisons). Independent Deliberation was consistently preferred in randomized blind testing across all textbooks.
Table 3. Most frequent bias taxonomy categories with mean severity scores (Independent Deliberation, N = 270)
Fig. 2. A generated HTML report highlighting extracted historical bias, taxonomy categorization, and assigned severity scores
Table 1. The 7-point ordinal severity scale used by jury agents
